body:
I studied the beautiful woman in front of me, I couldn’t help but notice before each sip, she would tap her index and middle finger against the side of the mug. That small action had me fascinated each time it occurred. It wasn’t the fact that she was tapping, but the fact that each time it occurred it drew my eyes to her hands.

They were were graceful, with long delicate fingers and nails cut short, but still coated with a gorgeous shade of bordeaux. There was something mesmerizing in the way she held the mug and the way her fingers wrapped around the handle, that thoroughly entranced me.

She cleared her throat and I found myself looking up at her face, she had been watching me watch her and I think she had said something, that I totally missed lost in her hands . A slight smirk peeked from the corner of her lips. When I looked away, she shifted the way she had head the mug. Now her entire hand had wrapped around the mug itself, the mug, with her middle and ring finger now through the handle, with the other two spread to the top and bottom. She didn’t repeat whatever I had missed, instead, she once again tapped the mug again, this time using the middle t
reblog_comment:
I studied the beautiful woman in front of me, I couldn’t help but notice before each sip, she would tap her index and middle finger against the side of the mug. That small action had me fascinated each time it occurred. It wasn’t the fact that she was tapping, but the fact that each time it occurred it drew my eyes to her hands.

They were were graceful, with long delicate fingers and nails cut short, but still coated with a gorgeous shade of bordeaux. There was something mesmerizing in the way she held the mug and the way her fingers wrapped around the handle, that thoroughly entranced me.

She cleared her throat and I found myself looking up at her face, she had been watching me watch her and I think she had said something, that I totally missed lost in her hands . A slight smirk peeked from the corner of her lips. When I looked away, she shifted the way she had head the mug. Now her entire hand had wrapped around the mug itself, the mug, with her middle and ring finger now through the handle, with the other two spread to the top and bottom. She didn’t repeat whatever I had missed, instead, she once again tapped the mug again, this time using the middle two fingers in a slower deliberate manner, like there was something she wanted me to see in that simple motion.

“What do you see,” she asked in a low and teasing voice, “is there something you like?” My eyes widened and looked deeply into hers, my face turning crimson. Apparently I was being obvious, so, of course she knew. All my words immediately hid in the corners of my mind and I could find none with which to reply.

She grinned at me, letting the silence stretch out between us. She traced her index finger along the rim of the mug, slowly and deliberately. Each movement made my heart beat faster. Her grin grew as she I kept being fascinated with her fingers. Eventually, she broke the silence with, “Cat got your tongue?”

Finally words came to me, although, as soon as they came out, I knew they were the wrong ones…"I wish!“ Immediately, my face grew warm and I felt like it must have started to glow bright red with how deep I must have been blushing.

She smirked at me and gave a slight head tilt as if to study me, "Well, that’s a new response…” Her grin grew bigger, “But I think there might have been a misunderstanding, I wasn’t necessarily offering. Although…I am awfully fond of the way you’re looking at my hands!”

My stomach decided to do somersaults at that revelation. She had noticed my gaze and OMFG she was actually enjoying it. My mind raced as I desperately tried to regain some small semblance of composure, but she was still sliding her fingers across her mug, easily distracting me from my attempts.

“You’re staring again,” she stated. This time, she curled her fingers inward, stretching them slightly before tapping them against the mug again in a slow, rhythmic fashion. I knew it was intentional at this point, but still I was drawn like a moth to a flame.

She leaned forward toward me, now taking her hands off the mug and then lightly placing one on each side of my face, this time to focus my attention fully on her. “Tell me,” she said softly in a voice only I could hear, “since you’re so fascinated, what would like to see…or feel them do?”
